summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The American Century Small Cap Growth Insights ETF (ACSG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is an actively managed ETF investing in US small-cap companies with accelerating growth rates and improving fundamentals. The fund seeks long-term capital growth through a bottom-up, research-driven approach supported by systematic portfolio construction ACSG was launched on Oct 16, 2025 and is issued by American Century Investments.

holdings.infoBox: ACSG is an equity ETF with a total of 318 individual holdings. The top holdings are CECO Environmental stock at 0.98%, Plexus at 0.94%, Crinetics Pharmaceuticals at 0.88%, Argan at 0.80%, and Hexcel at 0.80%.
